description_long: This is a large, elegant wooden dining table with an elongated oval top and six matching high-back chairs arranged around it. The table and chairs are crafted from a rich, medium-brown wood, featuring smooth, rounded edges and a polished finish. The chairs have tall, curved backs with vertical slats and slightly angled legs, providing both comfort and visual interest. The table's surface is broad and flat, suitable for group gatherings or communal dining. The overall design is classic and timeless, with a focus on functionality and understated sophistication. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing the natural beauty of the wood grain.
description: A large, oval wooden dining table with six matching high-back chairs, all in a polished medium-brown wood finish. The design is classic, smooth, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the table and all six chairs, with three chairs on each side.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the oval shape of the tabletop and the tall backs of the chairs at each end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the table's length and the arrangement of the six chairs.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, similar to view 1, focusing on the tabletop's oval contour and the chair backs.
